name: testimonials-rating
title: Testimonials Rating
description: A testimonials section: a responsive grid of review cards, each with a star rating, quote, author, optional role, and avatar.

preview.summary: Responsive grid of review cards, each with a star rating, quote, author, optional role and avatar.

sampleContent.title: Rated by the people who ship on it.

testimonials.quote: Acme is really extraordinary and practical — no need to break your head. A real gold mine for product teams.
testimonials.author: Olivia Miller

testimonials.quote: Acme transformed the way I develop web applications. The flexibility to customize every aspect is amazing.
testimonials.author: Ava Williams

testimonials.quote: The extensive collection of blocks has significantly accelerated my workflow. Highly recommended.
testimonials.author: Elijah Jones
